Apne bachchon ki janamdiwas par, custom cake kaise banaya ja sakta hai, iske bare mein bhi batayein.

animation_prompt: Hisar ki chhoti se chhoti galiyon mein, ghar-ghar ki khushiyan banane ke liye, humari premium bakery ke andar khane ka saman bante hain. Har frame mein apne swadisht baking ko prakat karein. Anmol swad ke saath humari logo ke saath, Hisar Bakery ka brand naam chhota-chhota font mein aakar ke saath darshayein.

animation_prompt: Ek sharmila ghar ki scene, jismein aapke ghar par gaon ki jagaah par Himachali-style decoration hai. Aapne ghar ki pehli floor par Hisar Bakery ke gujiya aur mathri ki tray hai. Saamne lagbhag ek golden color scheme hai jismein kai gulaabi rang ke gujiya aur mathri bhi dikhayi ja sakti hain.
